commands.name: adk-build
commands.description: Interview the user about a new ADK primitive or feature, then build it

commands.name: adk-dev-console
commands.description: Explain ADK Dev Console features, tabs, and UI concepts

commands.name: adk-document
commands.description: Create, review, update, sync, or search project documentation for an ADK bot

commands.name: adk-eval
commands.description: Write, run, or debug evals for an ADK bot

commands.name: adk-explain
commands.description: Explain an ADK bot's architecture, flow, and components

commands.name: adk-frontend
commands.description: Build frontend apps that integrate with ADK bots

commands.name: adk-init
commands.description: Scaffold a new Botpress ADK project

commands.name: adk-integration
commands.description: Discover, add, and configure Botpress integrations

commands.name: adk-ship
commands.description: Run pre-flight checks and deploy an ADK bot to production

commands.name: adk-test
commands.description: Invoke an ADK primitive end-to-end with realistic input to confirm it works

commands.name: adk-validate
commands.description: Validate an ADK primitive or a feature (a set of related primitives)
